# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 advances the engine to Skia m151 and delivers broad managed-code performance improvements. This release updates the bundled Skia engine to milestone m151 (with upstream bug-fix syncs), moves several hot-path type conversions and parsers into allocation-free managed C# code, adds .NET 11 WASM support via Emscripten 5.0.6, and fixes a native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia engine updated to milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine has been advanced to Chrome milestone m151, incorporating upstream rendering improvements. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Upstream Skia bug-fix syncs applied** — Multiple rounds of cherry-picked upstream bug fixes from the m151 branch have been merged, improving rendering correctness and stability. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443), [#4489](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4489))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing improved with ReadOnlySpan overloads** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char>, and the hex-parsing implementation has been optimised to avoid allocations. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed** — SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking a native handle when a crop region was specified; the handle is now correctly released. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))
- **Unnecessary unsafe modifier removed from GRContextOptions** — The unsafe modifier on GRContextOptions was redundant and has been removed, improving code clarity without any behaviour change. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **SKColor/SKColorF conversion ported to managed code** — The hot-path conversion between SKColor and SKColorF no longer crosses the P/Invoke boundary — it is now computed entirely in managed C#, reducing overhead on colour-heavy workloads. ([#4370](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4370))
- **SKPMColor premultiply/unpremultiply ported to managed integer math** — Single-value SKPMColor premultiply and unpremultiply operations now run in managed integer arithmetic instead of calling native code, eliminating interop overhead on the critical path. ([#4385](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4385))
- **SKFourByteTag.Parse made allocation-free** — SKFourByteTag.Parse no longer allocates a temporary char[4] on each call; the implementation now uses stack-allocated storage. ([#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))
- **SKShaper glyph results read via zero-copy spans** — Reading glyph output from SKShaper now uses direct Span<T> access into the native buffer instead of copying, cutting allocation and copy overhead for text-shaping workloads. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))

## Platform

- **Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries added for .NET 11 WASM** — Pre-built Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are now included, enabling SkiaSharp to target the .NET 11 WASM runtime. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459))
- **Skia submodule WASM preprocessor fix applied** — A redefinition of SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM in the Skia submodule has been dropped, resolving a build warning that could cause subtle WASM compilation issues. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))
- **WASM exception-handling regression testing added** — A dedicated preview-.NET WASM test job now runs on each CI build to catch exception-handling regressions before they reach consumers. ([#4488](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4488))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1 ships with two allocation-free performance improvements: Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder instead of allocating per call, and Tag.Parse eliminates the per-call char[4] temporary.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Added Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM libraries for .NET 11 support, contributed the HarfBuzzSharp allocation-free UTF-8 encoding, and fixed the WASM SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition in the Skia submodule ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 delivered managed-code performance wins across SKColor hex parsing, SKFourByteTag.Parse, SKShaper zero-copy glyph reads, and HarfBuzzSharp allocation-free encoding; also applied upstream m151 bug-fix syncs and removed the redundant unsafe modifier from GRContextOptions.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151.0 line by updating the Skia engine to milestone m151 and applying the WASM SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM submodule fix.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
